name: Radiant Typhoon Manifestation
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>絢</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>嵐</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>たる<ruby lang="jp"><rb>顕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>現</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
If this card is destroyed by the effect of "Mystical Space Typhoon": You can Set this card. Activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Radiant Typhoon Manifestation" once per turn);
● Send 1 "Radiant Typhoon" monster from your Deck to the GY.
● Add 1 "Mystical Space Typhoon" from your Deck or GY to your hand.

action: Sends from your Deck to your Graveyard
Activates if destroyed by card effect
